summary: Resolved remaining assessment audit flags: differentiated scenario an-09 from an-07 and removed soap-02 Plan duplication. Audit catalog updated to verified.

changes.issue: Pedagogically redundant with scenario:an-07 (both early tracheostomy airway management)

before.title: New Tracheostomy — Priority Assessment
before.setup: 58-year-old male is 2 hours post percutaneous tracheostomy placement. He is restless, pulling at linens, and SpO₂ has drifted from 96% to 91% on trach collar at 40% FiO₂.
before.correct_action: Trach patency, secretions, cuff pressure, and inner cannula — suction if indicated and increase O₂ per protocol

after.title: Tracheostomy — Suspected Mucus Plug
after.setup: 58-year-old male is 3 days post percutaneous tracheostomy. During routine suctioning, the catheter meets resistance at 10 cm and cannot advance. SpO₂ has dropped from 94% to 86% on trach collar. Patient appears panicked with accessory muscle use; breath sounds are markedly diminished bilaterally.
after.correct_action: Assess inner cannula for obstruction, instill sterile saline per protocol if ordered, have replacement trach and ambu bag at bedside, and notify RT/provider immediately

changes.pedagogical_distinction: an-07 teaches routine secretion clearance (gurgling, accessory muscles, SpO₂ 89%); an-09 teaches acute mucus plug/obstructed inner cannula recognition (catheter resistance, sudden desaturation, diminished breath sounds).

changes.issue: Plan section listed incentive spirometry twice

before.plan: Administer PRN analgesic per order; reassess pain in 30 min. Encourage IS q1h while awake. Advance diet as tolerated per surgeon order. Monitor temp q4h. Incentive spirometry, early ambulation. Notify provider if temp >101.5°F or pain unrelieved.

after.plan: Administer PRN analgesic per order; reassess pain in 30 min. Encourage IS q1h while awake. Advance diet as tolerated per surgeon order. Monitor temp q4h. Early ambulation. Notify provider if temp >101.5°F or pain unrelieved.

verify_notes.scenario:an-09: Fixed 2026-06: Differentiated from an-07 — mucus plug/obstructed inner cannula with catheter resistance and acute desaturation vs routine secretion clearance.
verify_notes.soap:soap-02: Fixed 2026-06: Removed duplicate incentive spirometry entry from Plan section.

ancillary_script_updates: scripts/audit_assessment_interactive.py — ANCILLARY_NOTES updated to reflect verified fixes

tests.message: All startup checks passed — DB, routers, assessment exports (10 steps, 20 flags), all modules OK

notes: No other duplicate Plan entries or redundant trach scenarios found in assessment.json.
